title: Referred publications 2016
description: You may need to refer to some of these publications and rulings to prepare your 2016 tax return.
keywords: Publication, Publication, Rulings and determinations, TaxPack, Tax return, TaxTime

content_blocks.text: To help you complete your 2016 tax return, we have provided a list of other publications that will help you to understand your tax obligations and complete your tax return. Some publications are essential to complete some items.

items: 2016 standard distribution statement: guidance notes for fund managers
Attribution managed investment trust (AMIT) tax return instructions 2016
Family trust election, revocation or variation 2016
Franking account tax return and instructions 2016
Guide to foreign income tax offset rules 2016
Interest on early payments and overpayments of tax 2016
Personal investors guide to capital gains tax 2016
Refund of franking credit instructions and application for individuals 2016
Refund of franking credits for individuals - application form 2016
Research and development tax incentive schedule 2016
Research and development tax incentive schedule instructions 2016
Self-managed superannuation fund annual return instructions 2016
Strata title body corporate tax return and instructions 2016
Timor Sea Treaty – Joint Petroleum Development Area instructions 2016
Venture capital deficit tax return and explanatory notes

content_text:
To help you complete your 2016 tax return, we have provided a list of other publications that will help you to understand your tax obligations and complete your tax return. Some publications are essential to complete some items.
## Popular publications
- Individual tax return instructions
- Information for specific occupations
## Publications
- 2016 standard distribution statement: guidance notes for fund managers
- Attribution managed investment trust (AMIT) tax return instructions 2016
- Business and professional items 2016
- Capital gains tax (CGT) schedule (NAT 3423)
- Company tax return 2016
- Company tax return instructions 2016

- Consolidated groups losses schedule instructions 2016
- Deductions for prepaid expenses 2016
- Dividend and interest schedule 2016

- Interest on early payments and overpayments of tax 2016

- Ultimate beneficiary schedule

- You and your shares 2016
